failed_checks.name: policy_binding
failed_checks.meaning: The receipt proves a manual-review policy, not the auto-allow policy requested by the verifier.

failed_checks.name: config_binding
failed_checks.meaning: The receipt was not issued under the service config fingerprint requested by the verifier.

failed_checks.name: build_binding
failed_checks.meaning: The receipt was not issued by the build requested by the verifier.

verify_report.buyer_meaning: The receipt is genuine, but it does not prove the wrong policy, wrong config, or wrong build. This is the control buyers want: a valid signature is not enough if the binding is wrong.
